issues.description: Text says '[Your Turn]' which indicates the effect lasts during your turn only. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. '[Your Turn]' in effect text is a specific temporal marker meaning the effect applies throughout your turn phase, not just until end of turn.
Target should specify the card name constraint '[Boa Hancock]' to match 'Up to 1 of your [Boa Hancock] cards'. Current target lacks this filter.
